question:
CA Barracas Central vs. Gimnasia y Esgrima de La Plata: Both Teams to Score

Description: In the upcoming Primera División Argentina game between CA Barracas Central and Gimnasia y Esgrima de La Plata, scheduled for December 1 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both CA Barracas Central and Gimnasia y Esgrima de La Plata each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligaprofesional.ar. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.ligaprofesional.ar/

evidences.title: Reglamento Torneos Primera División — extract (regulatory provisions)
evidences.content: Excerpt noting application of AFA regulations for execution of penalty kicks and squad composition rules: teams must be formed with players registered in their favor in AFA at the time of dispute of the Supercopa Argentina, and at least eight (8) of the twenty (20) players declared must be included on the match sheet. Also includes a chapter on the Supercopa Internacional establishing a single-match final format and examples of match pairings according to the applicable executive committee bulletin.

evidences.title: California Maps & Facts - World Atlas
evidences.content: With an area of 163,696 mi², California is the 3rd largest and the most populous state in the USA. Located in the north-central part of the state in the Sacramento Valley is Sacramento – the capital and the 6th largest city of California. It serves as the administrative, political, financial, educational, health-care, and tourism center of the state. It is also the cultural, and economic hub of the larger Sacramento Metropolitan Area. Situated in Southern California is Los Angeles – the largest and the most populous city in California. It is also the 2nd most populous city in the United States. The city of Los Angeles has been designated as a global city and is considered to be a leader in the technology, science, entertainment, and medicine industry. evidences.content: Voter Information Guide # California Secretary of State Translated Election Information : Election Information Información Electoral 選舉信息 चुनाव जानकारी 選挙情報 Impormasyon sa Halalan ពការបោះឆ្នោត 선거 정보 ข้อมูลการเลือกตั้ง Thông tn bầu cử Business ## Business Learn More Elections ## Elections Learn More Archives ## Archives Learn More Registries ## Registries Learn More Campaign Finance & Lobbying Activities ## Campaign Finance & Lobbying Activities Learn More Notary & Apostille ## Notary & Apostille Learn More Safe at Home ## Safe at Home Learn More News ## News Learn More California Redistricting bizfile California Diversity on Boards My Voter Status Vote California - Register to Vote [...] My Voter Status Vote California - Register to Vote California Redistricting ## Call Us (916) 653-6814 ## Receive Updates Sign up for e-updates ## Write Us Agency Contacts [...] Sign-up at WheresMyBallot.sos.ca.gov WheresMyBallot.sos.ca.gov The California Secretary of State’s office is excited to continue our award-winning Pop-Up Shop event series. Throughout the year, we partner with local county offices to bring in-person Apostille and Domestic Partnership services to a location near you. More...
